questions.question: Define the term 'logical equivalence' in the context of discrete mathematical structures. Provide an example to illustrate your definition.
questions.hint: Explain the concept of logical equivalence and provide a clear example.

questions.question: Prove that if A ⊆ B, then A ∪ B = B. (Hint: Use the properties of set union and subset relation.)
questions.hint: Use the properties of set union and subset relation to prove the statement.

questions.question: A proposition is said to be 'trivially true' if it is always true. Provide an example of a trivially true proposition in the context of discrete mathematical structures.
questions.hint: Explain the concept of trivially true propositions and provide a clear example.
